name: _DoIP_VehicleAnnouncementInd
title: _DoIP_VehicleAnnouncementInd
syntax: void _DoIP_VehicleAnnouncementInd(char VIN[], WORD logAddr, BYTE entityIdent[], BYTE groupIdent[], BYTE furtherActionRequired, BYTE VINGIDsyncStatus)
description: A Vehicle Announcement Message (VAM) has been received, possibly as a Vehicle Identification Response for a Vehicle Identification Request (VIR) Message. The responding vehicle indicates its presence.
If the responding vehicle’s VIN or EID has been selected as VIR parameter, this vehicle will be selected for communication.

parameters.name: VIN
parameters.description: Vehicle Identification Number (typically 17 characters). It is possible that a responding vehicle does not have a VIN yet.

parameters.name: logAddr
parameters.description: Logical DoIP address of the responding entity, e.g. the gateway.

parameters.name: entityIdent
parameters.description: (6 byte) Entity ID of the vehicle, often the Ethernet MAC address of the network interface controller transmitting the response.

parameters.name: groupIdent
parameters.description: (6 byte) Group ID of the vehicle.

parameters.name: furtherActionRequired
parameters.description: Indicates if a special routing activation method is required.

parameters.name: VINGIDsyncStatus
parameters.description: Indicates if the VIN and GID are already synchronized (0x0) or not (0x10).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
